title: Inconsistent result when using ndb cluster
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `t1` (`id` INT PRIMARY KEY, `name` VARCHAR(100), `value` DECIMAL(10,2), `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO `t1` VALUES (1, 'item1', 10.50, NULL), (2, 'item2', 20.75, NULL), (3, 'item3', NULL, NULL);
CREATE TABLE `t2` (`ref_id` INT, `description` TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (`ref_id`) REFERENCES `t1`(`id`));
SELECT `t1`.`id`, `t1`.`name`, COALESCE(`t2`.`description`, 'no description') AS `description` FROM `t1` LEFT JOIN `t2` ON `t1`.`id` = `t2`.`ref_id` WHERE `t1`.`value` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `t1`.`id`;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results between ndb cluster and non-cluster
